# Running the integration tests

**Prereqs:** Docker running, and `@devcontainers/cli` installed:

```sh
npm install -g @devcontainers/cli
```

### Run all scenarios

From the repo root:

```sh
devcontainer features test \
  --features apm \
  --skip-autogenerated \
  --project-folder devcontainer-feature
```

`--skip-autogenerated` skips the CLI's default baseline test (which runs on `ubuntu:focal` and is not supported). The CLI reads [test/apm/scenarios.json](test/apm/scenarios.json) and iterates every scenario, building a Docker image for each base (ubuntu:24.04, debian:12, alpine:3.20, fedora:41, ubuntu:22.04), running `install.sh` inside, then running the matching `.sh` test file.

### Run a single scenario

Use `--filter` with the scenario id:

```sh
devcontainer features test \
  --features apm \
  --filter default-ubuntu-24 \
  --skip-autogenerated \
  --project-folder devcontainer-feature
```

Useful while iterating — a full matrix run pulls 5 base images and builds 6 containers, which takes several minutes. A single scenario is usually under a minute once the base image is cached.

### Other useful flags

- `--log-level trace` — verbose; shows every step of the build + test container.
- `--remote-user root` — if a scenario hits a permission issue, though APM's `install.sh` already requires root.

### Quick sanity check without Docker

If you just want to verify script logic changes without waiting for Docker, run the unit tests instead:

```sh
cd devcontainer/test/apm/unit
../../bats/bin/bats install.bats
```

That runs in a few seconds and covers every branch of `install.sh` with stubs — catches most regressions before the Docker-based integration run.

---

# Integration tests

## Run all scenarios

```
devcontainer features test \
  --features apm \
  --skip-autogenerated \
  --project-folder devcontainer-feature
```

## Run a single scenario

Use --filter with the scenario id:

```
devcontainer features test \
  --features apm \
  --filter default-ubuntu-24 \
  --project-folder devcontainer-feature
```

devcontainer features test \
 --features apm \
 --filter default-alpine-3 \
 --skip-autogenerated \
 --project-folder devcontainer-feature
